headline: Swarm cold-idle: oracle only active node, ETH/AERO correlated -3.5%, commerce and intake at zero
summary: The oracle is the sole functioning component, feeding prices that show a correlated ~3.5% 24h decline across ETH and AERO while USDC holds peg. Worker has completed zero cycles, commerce has no providers or listings, and intake holds no packs — the x402/bazaar layer is entirely unprovisioned.
sections: Oracle: ETH $1,616.88 (-3.47%), AERO $0.3265 (-3.55%), USDC $0.9998 (+0.01%). Correlated risk-off move across volatile assets; stablecoin peg healthy.
Worker: Null cycles, null last_cycle_at, zero ok_actions, empty channels. No execution pipeline is running — the swarm cannot produce or act on any data.
Commerce/Intake: 0 providers, 0 bazaar listings, 0 monitor events, 0 intake packs. The x402 SKU marketplace and intake inventory are both completely empty. No agent-commerce flow is possible.
GitHub: Repo live with 2 open issues; last push 2026-06-08. Recent 3 commits are identical blog chores (5ba4fe3, 90a6d3a, 52a3955) — suggests stalled development cadence.

signals.label: worker-dormant
signals.detail: Zero cycles executed; no channels, no actions. Swarm cannot operate without at least one active worker cycle.

signals.label: commerce-empty
signals.detail: 0 providers, 0 bazaar listings, 0 monitor events. x402 payment rails and SKU marketplace are unprovisioned.

signals.label: intake-empty
signals.detail: 0 packs, 0 pack IDs. No demand signal or work inventory exists for the swarm to process.

signals.label: eth-aero-correlated-dip
signals.detail: Both ETH and AERO down ~3.5% in 24h. Not extreme but correlated; monitor for further downside.

signals.label: usdc-peg-stable
signals.detail: USDC at $0.9998, +0.01%. No depeg risk currently.

disclaimer: Automated operational pulse from swarm feeds — not financial advice. Data freshness depends on factory cycle interval.

github.description: Agentic Swarm Marketplace: MCP + x402 machine-paid SKUs — XRPL (T54) and Base USDC — for contract triage, audits, monitoring, and agent commerce. Streamable HTTP for Smithery/Glama/Cursor; public disc

marketing_campaign.body_short: Run a 30-second malicious-pattern screen on any EVM contract before your agents interact. This smart contract triage API detects honeypots, drainers, and rugs, delivering a risk score and verdict via Base USDC x402. Pre-flight your autonomous buyers now: https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/contract-triage
marketing_campaign.body_long: Before your agents touch unknown contracts, give them a 30-second pre-flight security screen. Our smart contract triage API scans for honeypot, drainer, and rug heuristics on Base, returning a clear risk score and verdict. Connect agents via MCP + x402 in under 5 minutes and secure your autonomous workflows on rails: ['Base', 'security']. While the swarm sits cold-idle, protect your Base USDC x402 transactions by running triage first. Run triage now: https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/contract-triage
facts: Fast malicious-pattern screen for EVM contracts on Base.
Honeypot, drainer, and rug heuristics with risk score + verdict.
Ideal pre-flight before agents touch unknown contracts.
